name: attendance
_note: Weekly rotation adopted from AttendanceW. 'anchor' must be a Monday when members[0] is assigned. Edit members/anchor to change the rotation; reorder to change who's next.

name: sound
_note: Sound rotation. anchor = Monday of week 1. First 4 weeks (the 'sequence') are the learning phase: the 4 experienced lead (Ryan not on week 1) while learners Maykel/Manweel shadow on alternating weeks (each shadows twice). After the sequence, all 6 rotate. 'members' is the steady cycle Ryan>Anthony>Daniel>Jona>Maykel>Manweel, listed starting at Anthony so it continues cleanly after week 4's Ryan (no back-to-back).
